# Robots.txt Optimizer

> Web app and TypeScript library for validating, analyzing, and optimizing robots.txt files — check syntax, summarize allow/block rules per user-agent, simulate crawler access, and get cleanup suggestions.

Robots.txt Optimizer is a Nuxt static web app backed by `@robots-txt-optimizer/core`, a framework-agnostic robots engine. Paste robots.txt content or fetch from a URL (with a server-side CORS fallback), then review validation issues, directive summaries, path simulation for common crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, GPTBot), and optimization suggestions. Share analyses via `?url=example.com`.

## App

- [Source & quick start](https://github.com/MaxwellCohen/robots-txt-optimizer#quick-start): Clone the repo, run `pnpm dev`, and open the site root to analyze robots.txt.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/MaxwellCohen/robots-txt-optimizer/blob/main/README.md): Features, quick start, scripts, and project structure.
- [CONTEXT.md](https://github.com/MaxwellCohen/robots-txt-optimizer/blob/main/CONTEXT.md): Domain glossary — RobotsDocument, path verdict, optimization suggestion, fetch seam.

## Optional

- [packages/core](https://github.com/MaxwellCohen/robots-txt-optimizer/tree/main/packages/core): Framework-agnostic parse, validate, analyze, optimize, and fetch modules with unit tests.
